creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 236053
v2.2 (apply via "git am")

Maintainer approval explicitly granted: you can do the rest, thank you very much Jan.

Please use the slightly different commit message I wrote: I find it clearer. Also please keep the patch splitted by ports. And I guess adding antoine's testing to the commit message would also be a good idea.

Thanks.
